subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: As we can only see different objects by the light of the sun, one might in one sense and with truth say the sun is in everything.
subcodes.subjects: @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @Manifestation of God as sun, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
